latest_tip.text: Ask for a lunch card if you are a regular.

latest_note.text: Spoiled kids decided to do homework here

latest_tip.text: "Welcome to this cool shared officespace. Do feel at home. Btw we don't like kids here."

latest_note.text: Every day, I buy a plastic box here, eat the content, then trash it. So does many other. Easy, but shops should be forced to go green.

latest_tip.text: The toilet in the lobby is bigger than your room.

latest_note.text: When there's a line on the street it must be good.

latest_tip.text: Rent a radio controlled sailboat. Show the kids the joy of sailing.

latest_note.text: Sad when the only #coffee+#wifi option is Starbucks.
I love how you can get street food to stay or to go
Getting Coke for a stomach can be a challenge in organic Hipsterville.
On photo tour, having a drink to see if that improves my photos. 📷
